title: MineWorld
description: New generation with new mobs, armors, and weapons.
body:
MineWorld adds a few things, for starters it adds an entirely new ore set with tools and armor, its twice as strong as netherite but at the cost of being twice as rare! The second main thing this adds is a new biome called the Orange Oak Forest, the only difference between it and normal oak is it's signature orange color. And finally a not so important feature is the deep dark poppy which spawns on deep slate in groups of 3, bring some back as a trophy to conquering the darkness!

 

4/8/2023 - Now With Emerald And Blood Diamond Tools, plus emerald dust ore which can be turned into emeralds!

4/9/2023 - added katanas in all variants apart from emerald, they have 2 attack speed and do the same damage as their normal sword counterparts.


Patreon: [https://www.patreon.com/Swaix](https://www.patreon.com/Swaix)
Ko-Fi: [https://ko-fi.com/swaix](https://ko-fi.com/swaix)
